THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SADLIER, NANCY M. AFTER TRIAL BY JURY, WHERE THE PLTFS SUHEIL SALFITI AND VICTORIA SALFITI WERE AWARDED $ 1,638 AND THE CROSS-PLTF NANCY SADLIER WAS AWARDED $ 12,947.00. IT IS HEREBY ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT CROSS-COMPLAINTANT SADLIER SHALL HAVE JUDGEMENT AGAINST SUHEIL SALFITI AND VICTORIA SALFITI IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 11,309. COSTS AND FEES TO BE DETERMINED BY POST-TRIAL MOTIONS AND COST BILLS.
